hero.title: A place where your feelings matter
hero.subtitle: A safe, confidential space to explore your thoughts, emotions, and experiences without judgment.

about-us.title: Welcome to Nirvana Therapy
description:
Nirvana Therapy was created as a space where people can slow down and feel supported. The word Nirvana refers to liberation, a release from suffering and the patterns that keep us feeling stuck. In this context, it does not imply the absence of pain or difficulty, but the possibility of relating to our experiences with greater awareness and freedom. 
 This practice was shaped around that idea: not forcing change, but creating space for understanding to emerge. Therapy can be helpful during many moments in life whether you're dealing with stress, emotional exhaustion, relationship struggles, grief, past experiences that still linger, or simply a feeling that something isn’t quite right. You don’t need to arrive with clear answers. Therapy here begins with listening and unfolds gently, guided by what feels most relevant to you. 
 At Nirvana Therapy, sessions are collaborative, gentle, and grounded. Together, we explore your thoughts, emotions, and patterns at a pace that feels safe and manageable. The goal isn’t to “fix” you, but to help you understand yourself with greater clarity and self-compassion. 
 At Nirvana Therapy, sessions are collaborative, gentle, and grounded. Together, we explore your thoughts, emotions, and patterns at a pace that feels safe and manageable. The goal isn’t to “fix” you, but to help you understand yourself with greater clarity and self-compassion. 
 If you’re looking for a space to pause, reflect, and gradually find more freedom in how you relate to yourself and your life, Nirvana Therapy is here to support you. Let’s talk, explore, and make space for the life you deserve

meet-the-founder.title: Meet the Founder
meet-the-founder.headline: Hey, I am Shreya!
meet-the-founder.qualification: MSc in Psychology (Clinical), PGD Counselling Psychology
meet-the-founder.description:
My journey into therapy was shaped by something I've often been called- “sensitive”. What once felt like something I needed to hide has become one of my greatest strengths. Feeling deeply allows me to understand people beyond their words, notice what remains unspoken, and hold space for emotions with care and compassion. 
 In our sessions, I work with you, not on you. Together, we create a space that feels safe, reflective, and deeply human where you can explore your emotions, understand your experiences, and move toward healing and growth. 
 My approach to therapy is rooted in empathy, curiosity, and emotional attunement. I draw from Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT), Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT), and trauma-informed practices, adapting my work to each person’s unique needs and pace.
 With two years of counselling experience and a strong passion for breaking the stigma around mental health, At Nirvana Therapy, our goal is to help you feel lighter, more in control and connected to yourself.
meet-the-founder.card: I believe therapy isn't just about fixing problems, it's about feeling seen, heard, and understood. At its core, therapy is a space where you can slow down, make sense of your experiences, and feel less alone in what you’re carrying.

feedback: I feel very safe and comfortable with my therapist. She listens to me with genuine empathy and understanding. I truly appreciate the supportive and non-judgmental space she creates for me.

I’m genuinely so glad I chose her as my therapist. This was my first session and I honestly couldn’t have asked for a better start. She was so warm, patient and deeply human it instantly made me feel safe and understood. I know it’s a therapist’s job to be empathetic, but with her, it felt so genuine, like she truly cared about what I was feeling. I felt like someone who’s just taken a deep breath after being underwater for too long. I walked out of the session feeling lighter, hopeful and more in control of my own life. For the first time in a while, I feel like I can take care of myself again, make my own rules and find happiness and peace from within. I’m already looking forward to my next session. I’m starting to like this new version of me and I’m so grateful to her for helping me take that first step!
Shreya is amazing with her work. I feel heard and secure about discussing my issues with her. Her approach has really helped me cope up with my mental health.

The session was amazing. Shreya helped me understand my fear and patterns. It's easy for me to communicate with her without the fear of judgement. She has really helped me with coping up with situations which are out of my control
She is very thorough with her approaches and makes you feel seen and heard. Her techniques are very helpful as well.

I’m really grateful for how easy she makes it to open up. She creates a space that feels comfortable, honest, and safe - which is something I didn’t expect to experience so quickly. Therapy feels lighter and more approachable with her.

Shreya helped me cope with so much in a very short time. Through just a few sessions, she helped me unlearn years of negative thoughts and self-doubt. Today, I feel light, positive and genuinely happy every single day, and I owe it all to her! She truly is the best!

Finding Shreya as my first therapist was the biggest blessing. Being just a few weeks into therapy, I’ve found it to be so rewarding; because finally someone gets me. Since the beginning, Shreya has always made sure to ask how I’m doing. That alone makes me feel so seen. Every week it’s becoming easier for me to open up, easier for me to understand myself, and most of all, understand how I can be kinder to myself. I’m so grateful for having discovered Nirvana Therapy, because it’s completely changed my life for the better!

description.title: Trust & Emotional Safety
description.description:
Choosing a therapist requires trust and a sense of safety. Nirvana Therapy offers a calm, non-judgmental space where you can slow down, speak openly, and explore your experiences without feeling rushed or dismissed. 
 Careful listening and clear professional boundaries create consistency and emotional safety throughout the process.

description.title: Evidence-Based Practice
description.description:
The work is grounded in evidence-based therapeutic practice and guided by a thoughtfully structured approach. 
 Sessions focus not only on present challenges but also on the patterns influencing how you think, feel, and respond across different areas of life, helping develop deeper understanding and clarity.

description.title: Insight & Practical Tools
description.description:
Clients often value the balance of reflection, insight, and practical tools offered in therapy. 
 The approach remains professional, ethical, and human, focusing on developing self-awareness, emotional strength, and the ability to make choices that feel right for you rather than being told what to do.

description.title: Trauma
description.description:
“I still feel affected by things that happened years ago.” 
 “I get triggered easily and don’t always understand why.”

description.title: Friendships and Peer Concerns
description.description:
“I feel left out or unsure where I stand with friends.”
“My friendships feel draining or one-sided.”

description.title: Emotional Regulation
description.description:
“My emotions feel too intense or overwhelming.”
“I either react strongly or shut down completely.”

description.title: Identity Exploration
description.description:
“I don’t really know who I am anymore.”
“I feel lost about what I want from my life.”

description.description:
“I’m constantly stressed about work or studies.”
“I can’t concentrate or feel motivated anymore.”

description.title: Sleep & Somatic Complaints
description.description:
“I struggle to fall or stay asleep.”
“My stress shows up as headaches, fatigue, or body pain.”

description.description:
“I haven’t been the same since I lost someone or something important.”
“I feel stuck in my grief and don’t know how to move forward.”

“My mind doesn’t stop racing.”
“I keep replaying conversations and worrying about the future.”

description.description:
“I constantly doubt myself.”
“I feel like I’m never good enough.”

“I’m confused or questioning and don’t feel comfortable talking about it elsewhere.”

description.description:
“I’m struggling to adjust to a big change in my life.”
“Everything feels uncertain right now.”

description.description:
“I don’t feel seen or understood in my relationship.”
“I keep repeating the same patterns in dating or relationships.”

description.title: Depression & Low Mood
description.description:
“I don’t feel happy anymore.”
“Things that used to matter don’t seem to affect me now.”

description.title: Perfectionism

“I’m scared of making mistakes or failing.”

description.title: Stress & Burnout
description.description:
“I feel exhausted all the time.”
“I’m running on empty and don’t know how to rest.”

description.title: Executive Functioning Difficulties
description.description:

“I procrastinate, feel disorganized, and fall behind.”

description.title: Familial Relationships
description.description:

“I struggle with boundaries or old family patterns.”

description.title: Body Image Concerns
description.description:
“I’m constantly unhappy with how I look.”
“My relationship with my body feels difficult.”

description3.description: Click the link “Register” and fill out the registration form with your basic details.
After you submit the form, someone from the team will reach out to you to continue the process.
You will be offered a time slot for your first consultation, which will be mutually decided by you and the therapist.
You will receive a payment link to complete the booking. Payment is requested only after the session slot is offered.

therapy-process.title3: Voila! Your healing journey begins now.

terms-and-conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
terms-and-conditions.subtitle: Last Updated- 12 March 2026
description: By accessing this website or engaging with services offered by Nirvana Therapy, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

Nirvana Therapy provides professional counselling and psychotherapy services. Therapy is a collaborative process and outcomes may vary from person to person. Therapy does not guarantee specific results and is not a substitute for medical care, psychiatric treatment, or emergency services.
Eligibility- Therapy services are offered to individuals 18 years and above. By reaching out or booking a session, you confirm that you meet this requirement.

Mode of Therapy- Sessions are offered online and in person (Kolkata). Online sessions are conducted via secure video platforms. While care is taken to maintain privacy, Nirvana Therapy cannot be held responsible for technical issues such as internet disruptions or platform-related limitations beyond reasonable control.
Appointments & Scheduling- Sessions are scheduled by mutual agreement after initial contact. Each session is 60 minutes long. Late arrivals may result in reduced session time.

Fees & Payments- Nirvana Therapy believes that mental health care should be accessible. Fees are discussed during the first point of contact, and a sliding scale may be offered based on individual circumstances. Once agreed upon, the fee remains consistent unless communicated otherwise. Payments are required in advance to confirm a session.

Cancellation & No-Show Policy- Cancellations or rescheduling more than 24 hours in advance are not charged. Cancellations within 24 hours may attract a partial or full session fee. No-shows without prior notice are chargeable in full. Exceptions may be considered in genuine emergencies and are handled on a case-by-case basis.

Confidentiality- All therapy sessions are confidential and conducted in line with professional ethical guidelines. Information shared during sessions will not be disclosed without consent, except in situations where there is a risk of harm to self or others, abuse, neglect, or exploitation is suspected, or disclosure is required by law.

Communication Outside Sessions- Clients may reach out via email or WhatsApp for scheduling or important observations. These channels are not meant for ongoing therapeutic conversations. Responses outside sessions are not guaranteed, except in urgent situations.

Emergency Situations - Nirvana Therapy does not provide crisis or emergency services. In case of immediate distress, suicidal thoughts, or risk of harm, clients are advised to contact local emergency services or crisis helplines.

Scope of Practice & Referrals- If a concern falls outside the therapist’s scope of competence, or if a dual relationship arises, Nirvana Therapy reserves the right to ethically discontinue therapy and provide appropriate referrals.

Limitation of Responsibility- While care is taken to provide ethical and professional support, Nirvana Therapy cannot be held responsible for events occurring outside therapy sessions, including emotional distress, lack of improvement, or crises. Clients are encouraged to maintain additional support systems.
Website Use - All content on this website is for informational purposes only and may not be copied, reproduced, or used without permission.
Updates to Terms- These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the website or services implies acceptance of any revised terms.
terms-and-conditions.description2: For any clarification connect with us on nirvanatherapy23@gmail.com
